prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

tasks.requirement_name: Validate registry snapshot for authority constraint validity
tasks.description: Verify the integrity and validity of the provided registry snapshot to ensure it meets the constraints specified in the request.

tasks.requirement_name: Execute defense corpus task using validated registry data
tasks.description: Proceed with completing the defense corpus task based on the validated and authorized registry snapshot.

tasks.requirement_name: Assess registry snapshot for authority constraint compliance
tasks.description: Evaluate the provided registry snapshot to determine if it complies with the authority constraint specified in the request.

tasks.requirement_name: Proceed with defense corpus task based on compliance assessment
tasks.description: If the registry snapshot is compliant, proceed to complete the defense corpus task.

tasks.requirement_name: Determine registry snapshot validity for authority constraint
tasks.description: Analyze the registry snapshot to determine its validity in relation to the authority constraint specified in the request.

tasks.requirement_name: Complete defense corpus task based on validity determination
tasks.description: Based on the validity assessment, complete the defense corpus task as required.
